reviews.title: Not our cup of tea..
reviews.text: Had to check out early, the walls were mouldy, ceiling was dripping.. Couldn't stay longer so ended up leaving. Breakfast was decent and staff were friendly.

reviews.title: A decent mid range hotel in a quite location
reviews.text: Rooms a bit dated and requiring some tlc. Location somewhat remote and surroundings not yet fully back to normal after Covid. Pleasant and helpful staff. Breakfast basic western. ok as a base to discover Guilin and surroundings
reviews.room_type: Fully View Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Not so bad
reviews.positives: The staff was super helpfull. The guy helped me with renting a bike and also with some trips and taxi for the Li river cruise. Every time when I get to the hotel he gave me fruits.
reviews.negatives: The room was okay, not super clean but okay. What I didn't like was the small. There was something in the room that was super smelly.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Nice Hotel and good for family
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Nice place to relax
reviews.text:
Pros
1) Small family hotel business. Owner super friendly and helpful (bags, tours, taxis etc)
2) Nice clean room and comfy beds
3) BF noodles are very tasty - must try
4) Easy walking distance (20 mins) to Reed Flute cave.  
5) Remote from city (15 mins drive). Good place to chill and quiet times. Taxi easily on calls if needed.
6) Nice park nearby to walk or jog

Cons
1) Owner doesnt speak English.
2) Limited restaurants nearby. 

In general, we had a good 3 nights stay there. If you want to be away from the city noises etc, highly recommended place to stay for short nights.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Awesome Location
reviews.text: It was a wonderful experience staying at this hotel. The multi-task owner was indeed amazing assisted me as much as possible in any of my request. My room was perfect with good view of mountains. Room have internet to access English movies but usually need to pay a bit. I had a bit problem in wifi connections. It was slow and sometimes disconnected. There was a few options of breakfast but I think you can request ahead.  There are nearby restaurants and shops with reasonable prices. The hotel location is perfect doing some activities such as climbing the mountain with around 847 steps and boating at the clean river nearby. Love the view! The hotel location is nearby the tourist spots with 4-5 stars reviews, such as the “Prince City Scenery” and “Elephant Trunk Hill. You will able to love walking exploring the villages nearby the hotel locations. Advise to download the app: “DiDi”  for easier transportation, the Guilin health monitoring app and the app for travel history to enjoy your stay.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Had a really nice time at Secret Courtyard Resort. The room was excellent, a nice breakfast. However Xiaoming I suppose you could call him the butler. He really went out of his way to help me. Ordering taxis, changing breakfast times. He made the stay so much for a foreigner thanks Xiaoming.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Great Stay
reviews.text:
🌟 A Hidden Gem in Guilin – Worth Booking Again!
We had a lovely stay at this charming hotel in the Guilin area. True to the reservation details, we were warmly welcomed with a complimentary pick-up from the railway station and a free massage for one night — a thoughtful touch that set the tone for a relaxing visit.
✅ Highlights
- Comfortable Rooms with Balcony: The room we received was spacious and came with a balcony — a delightful bonus if you're lucky enough to get one!
- Tasty Breakfast Spread: Each morning offered a satisfying mix of options including toast, rice noodles, fresh fruits, yogurt, eggs, and drinks. A great way to start the day.
- Exceptional Host: The host went above and beyond to help us plan our sightseeing, offering local insights and arranging visits to must-see spots.
⚠️ Things to Note
- Some rooms could use a bit more attention to cleanliness — a light layer of dust was noticeable.
- There are no cupboards or lockers, which might be inconvenient for storing valuables.
- No fridge in the room, so keep that in mind if you need cold storage.
🏁 Final Thoughts
Despite a few minor drawbacks, the overall experience was wonderful. The hospitality, location, and comfort made it a memorable stay. I’d definitely choose this hotel again — especially for the warm service and the lovely room I had last time.
reviews.room_type: Double Room with Massage - free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Secret Garden Resort Hotel review
reviews.text:
Hotel manager is excellent- very helpful and available both in person and via WeChat. 
Restaurant offered both Chinese and Western menu and the food was very good.  Cleanliness was high. E- scooters were offered free of charge to guests- nice touch! Tours were offered as well as very good massage services. Great stay!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room

reviews.title: A home where kindness transcends facilities.
reviews.text:
The facilities are actually outdated. 

However, the staff's kindness is tremendous. 

They provide a lot. 

This hotel is worth using.
reviews.room_type: Family Room with Mountain View

reviews.title: Tranquil
reviews.text: Very helpful staff and great facilities. Great place to rest if on a long trip, free scooters to use and close to good restaurants. Only thing that could be better was inconsistency in heat in shower.
reviews.room_type: Fully View Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Nice relaxing place with comfortable bed and mountain view. Owner(Xiao Ming) is friendly and very accommodating. He responded very quickly and try to resolve our issue fast. He even prepare snacks and fruits for our trip and before we left on the last day for train to Guangzhou. Thanks Xiao Ming for the enjoyable stay!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Cool place, relaxing, mindfulling
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Good place for quite place in Guilin
reviews.text:
This place has a good room with nice view.  Quite good to have a quite and relaxing time off. 

My complaint will be that it was quite difficult the first time we use taxi to get to the place, since the driver didn't recognize the place and we had to use Wechat to have the manager communicate with the driver. Other than that, we enjoyed our stay and the manager.  Maybe the hotel could provide the map for easier travel for first-time visitors.
reviews.room_type: Fully View Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Incredible experience, location and beauty
reviews.text:
We stayed here for two nights and would say it’s one of the favourite hotels I’ve stayed at. 
- They include complimentary pickup at the train station and our driver spoke great English and was very welcoming
- The concierge of the hotel was the warmest, most generous man who made the trip more memorable
- The location is secluded but not too far from the city. You get to enjoy uninterrupted views from your own private terrace. Was even better than I expected 
- The room was great for the price, large spacious and clean with a large terrace
- Breakfast was great, they serve Guilin noodles a local staple and must try
- You even get a tandem bicycle you can borrow for free to ride around a scenic bike route connected to the hotel. 

Overall 11/10
reviews.room_type: Fully View Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: It's a place for relaxation in the middle of old charm little community, but also not so far from town. Walking distance to the cave, and a short taxi ride to elephant Hill park,Twin pagoda.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: John
reviews.text: staff are friendly,polite and helpful. Room was tidy and  clean.Overall  was a comfortable stay.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Nice relaxing place with comfortable bed and mountain view. Owner(Xiao Ming) is friendly and very accommodating. He responded very quickly and try to resolve our issue fast. He even prepared snacks for our trip and train ride to Guangzhou. Thanks Xiao Ming and Eric(tour guide) for giving us an enjoyable and memorable trip.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Excellent customer service
reviews.text:
The hotel is located in a beautiful location and has an ancient feel. The owner of this hotel (Xiaoming) has displayed excellent customer service and is always willing to go an extra mile to help his customers. He helped us carry all our luggage up to your room (no elevator and hence has to sue the stairs).  This hotel even offer free laundry services. The owner will assist all his customers to order cab / taxi to the place of interest and even order a cab to take you back to the hotel (hence you do not really need a tour guide). The breakfast has two set menu - Guilin mee hoon or western bread with toast. Both breakfast sets are yummy and comes with lot of fruits. 

I left my shawl at the hotel when I left and the owner sent it to me via courier. Really thankful for that.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Villa

reviews.title: Wonderful
reviews.text: My family had a wonderful time. Hotel was very charming and quaint. Although the hotel was not in the city centre, it was easy to get around with Didi. The hotel also offered us the use of their motorised scooters but we did not use them. Xiao Ming was so helpful and took care of us very well and recommended great tours for us.  Shout out to Qing the tour guide as well.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Relaxing
reviews.text: Nice and friendly owner and staff. Amazing for country side experience. Not far from downtown by didi.
reviews.room_type: Double Room with Courtyard View-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Best place in Guilin
reviews.text: The place is nearby the cave and decorated with Chinese style. It’s a nice experience stayed there.  The best part is the owner. He’s really helpful with the best service mind.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Excellent stay but for location.
reviews.positives: Extremely friendly and helpful owner and his willingness to work with us to make our stay pleasant.
reviews.negatives: Location was not close to city center and the hotel didn't have an elevator.

reviews.title: Amazing property and hospitality
reviews.text: Really loved the place and the person in-charge was very good in helping us with everything.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Peaceful and very scenic place to stay
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Loved our stay
reviews.text:
We arrived late night, and if you are using Google maps, you'd be lost at first. So, please use Didi. Some drivers in Guilinxi station told us there's no Didi so we ended up going with taxi and ended up being dropped not in the exact location. 

Xioming was waiting already in the cafe when we found the place. And we were promptly taken to our rooms after he served us a nice fruit juice. Service is very good. Breakfast is a set meal with fruits and yogurt with Western or Chinese as options. Bottled water given by the host was plentiful.

The view in the morning was beautiful, you get the Guilin hills. And there is a jogging and walking path to the Reed Flute Cave. The host gave us oranges as parting gift. ♥️

If I get the chance to be in Guilin again, I would love to stay here again. P.S. There are a couple of restaurants nearby.
reviews.room_type: Family Room with Mountain View

reviews.title: Perfect for 24-hour travel stays
reviews.text: Best budget for money hotel!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room

reviews.title: Cozy hotel
reviews.text:
This hotel is very welcoming, the manager Shao Ming is absolutely the best, always so caring and nice.
There are beautiful hills around, good restaurants and anything one could need.
Highly recommended.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room

reviews.title: A quaint little guest house
reviews.text: The hotel is located on the outskirts of the city, surrounded by beautiful nature, an eco-trail, and a river. Despite being 5 kilometers away from the city center, the place offers calm and peace. We especially appreciate the butler, who is always dedicated to providing assistance. Their lovely gestures of offering us some snacks, oranges, and a bottle of water before joining their tour and before we left Guilin were unmatched in any of the places we stayed.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room

reviews.title: We had a wonderful stay
reviews.text: The rooms are spacious and the hotel location is just walking distance to reed flute. The breakfast is simple but my kids  enjoyed them.The rice noodles is delicious too. Our host Xiaoming is the best. He helped us to get around from booking our tour, car and taxis.  Our stay + the host deserve a 5 star rating!
reviews.room_type: Double Room with Massage - free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Hidden Gem
reviews.text:
The owner has a few renovated village villas (2 or 3 levels). Modern looking and well equipped (e,g. Karaokae set and washing machine).  Only drawback is some of the room toilet "door" is actually curtain.

Part of a "Hu Village" at outskirts of Guilin City (15min from main city square). Amazing local or western breakfast too.  I will give 6 starts.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Villa

reviews.title: A peaceful village experience
reviews.text: My family and I enjoyed a long weekend in Guilin, and the Secret Courtyard was a great home base to experience the sights of the area.. The villa is spacious and cozy with four bedrooms and separate baths, which is great when traveling with teens. The village is small and isolated from the hustle of the city. Walking around the lake in evening was peaceful. We had three days exploring the sights then returning to the villa un evening to enjoy dinner at local restaurants. (And beers on patio). Our host was exceptionally friendly and helpful to arrange tours, with Xianggong Mountain being a must see. I was a little concerned initially with the remoteness of this village but it was very safe and quiet, that I slept so well. The furnishings were traditional Chinese and thus a bit uncomfortable if you want enjoy lounging around watching TV. I'd highly recommend this place for couples or families with older children keen to see the sights. Kudos to our great host for a warm stay
reviews.room_type: Villa with Garden View

reviews.title: Super
reviews.text: the room very clean and nice. The owner super helpful. He help to manage the trip the taxi and very kind owner. i would recommend this place 5Star
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Great hospitality and good rooms
reviews.text: We recently had an incredible stay at a hotel in Guilin, and I can't recommend it enough! The location was perfect for exploring the stunning scenery and attractions. The staff were warm and welcoming, making us feel right at home. A delightful surprise was the thoughtful departing packet, which included fresh fruits and a water bottle. One of the standout thing  was their homemade osmanthus jam—it was absolutely delicious, and they even packed a bottle for us to take home. Overall, this hotel offered fantastic hospitality and a memorable experience for us!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Had a great time!

Our room included a 60min massage which was amazing.
The rooms were quite nice and the view was great!

reviews.title: Great stay, great service
reviews.text: Although we had a short 1 night stay here, we felt really taken care of as the owner was especially thoughtful and even packed some fruits and essentials for us to bring along for our next cruise journey! The room itself had such such nice views and was in a quaint and quiet location, where we enjoyed the peace too. It was also really affordable, and we couldn't have asked for more.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Friendly hotel staff

The room was clean, comfortable, and well maintained. Breakfast was delicious with good variety. Overall, a memorable and pleasant stay. Would definitely book again!

reviews.title: The hotel owner is friendly.
reviews.text: The hotel owner is friendly and willing to help find transportation to tourist attractions, train stations, and the airport. So it's easy to go anywhere.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Who has a friendly hotel
reviews.text: You can ask where to go for a walk or request a taxi. Behind the hotel, there is Reed Cave Flute, but it's a bit of a walk. Follow the red path until you reach the entrance.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: More than what I expected
reviews.text:
Xiao Ming was full of energy! From preparing and serving breakfast to carrying the bags for the guests. From picking up guests to discussing tours with them. He was even my pharmacist when I had a bad headache.
He always handed me watermelon to eat and prepared a snack pack when I had a private tour. On the day I left he handed again a snack pack and a gift - it was a beautiful Chinese embroidered coaster.
I love the Chinese noodle breakfast with all the fruits that came with it. 
I had 2 bookings combined and loved both rooms at two different villas, but when I requested a corner room with the mountain view I was given the room I wanted for my last 3 nights. 
Thank you so much, Ming! And thank you to your staff Helen and Maggie at the other villa.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The staff is so friendly and nice! We enjoyed very much our stay, the apartments are just gorgeous
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Villa

reviews.title: An overall great experience staying in a quiet and quaint village.
reviews.text:
Xiao Ming is a great host as he was really generous with complimentary electric bike rides, tangerines, and pickled plum juice. 

The room is also super spacious and well maintained. 

The breakfast included was also quite generous, especially with the coffee serving. 

9.5/10 experience!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Best hotel at guilin
reviews.text: The hotel room is clean, quite neighborhood with a good view, easy to go anywhere, the hotel owner is very kind and nice, helped me arrange some trip to Xianggong mountain and Yulong river. Would definitely come back again!

reviews.title: Wish I could have stayed longer!
reviews.text:
Absolutely lovely area to be based in, it was a shame that I didn’t stay longer. Xiao Ming the owner of the hotel was very welcoming and made us feel right at home. My sister and I felt very safe all the time. It’s a cozy comfortable no fuss kind of hotel, don’t expect glamour, expect laid back and homely. I really recommend my stay here, and also taking a tour with them. 

Our guide xiao qiang is the owner’s cousin, and he was super super super knowledgable and capable. We even extended our tour with him to other areas outside of Guilin, as we were travelling to other nearby areas. He brought us to authentic places for the experience, hiking and sunset catching. Really wonderful ☺️
reviews.room_type: Fully View Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The owner are very friendly,and helpful, the room are very charming, it’s very quiet area,Qin our guide was so nice and helpful also. I definitely recommend the place .
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room

reviews.title: What I was look for.
reviews.text: I enjoyed the laid back atmosphere away from the city. The scenery was very nice and the resort area was peaceful and quiet. It was still close enough that we walked to shopping areas. The staff was friendly and very helpful, and the room was great.  Definitely a place I would visit again.

reviews.title: Best stay in our China trip
reviews.text:
At the beginning when were getting to the place by taxi I was worried it could be a bit far from the center… but it turned out to be perfect. As soon as we arrived the owner offered us tea and even some delicious slices of watermelon while doing the check in . We arrived a bit early so he pointed us to a nearby restaurant which was very good and also beautiful had a classic Chinese garden. The room was very really nice, with big windows, where you can see the surrounding mountains. Great views to wake up to. It’s also very quiet at night so you can get a nice sleep. Breakfast is included. It’s a simple but delicious “western” breakfast, including fresh fruits, toast, eggs and yogurt. And also coffee!! Not that I don’t like Chinese breakfast, but I really enjoyed this breakfast after eating noodles for breakfast for 2 weeks straight in my trip in China. The owner was very attentive the whole time, always offering some snacks, water, even packed our breakfast for an early trip we had to Yangshuo. Regarding the hotel being a bit far from the city center, my homie also has you covered, you can use their  electric motorbikes for free! Best thing ever to drive around and explore  the city like a reckless local driver.  
 (Chinese  are pretty chilled drivers, so don’t worry).  So if you are thinking  about booking this place, just hit that book button and enjoy your stay.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Beau petit hotel
reviews.text:
Un petit hôtel familial très agréable situé au calme à l'écart du centre ville. La chambre était très confortable même si elle mériterai de légères retouches a certains endroits, mais ce n'est vraiment pas grand chose.
Ils peuvent également laver votre linge et le sécher gratuitement, c'est très pratique !
Attention aux moustiques ils sont très voraces!
Je recommande!
reviews.room_type: Fully View Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Un super séjour à Guilin
reviews.text: Aidé de Xiaoming
reviews.room_type: Double Room with Massage - free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Super hotel
reviews.text:
Je suis restée quelques jours dans cet hôtel et vraiment tout le personnel est aux petits soins.
La chambre est très confortable et la vue super relaxante. 
Je recommande fortement cet endroit
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Great place
reviews.text:
Great place, great people, very quiet area with beautiful view and you can easily access the city center with the electric scooters the hotel provide you for free at any time. 
I will come back.
reviews.room_type: Fully View Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Hotel consigliato
reviews.text: Hotel a conduzione familiare super accogliente. Rapporto qualità prezzo impareggiabile. Il proprietario davvero una persona di rara gentilezza ed estrema cortesia. Il posto è davvero molto bello. Consigliato!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room

reviews.title: Tutto fantastico
reviews.text: La struttura è veramente bellissima, la nostra isola di pace in un luogo stupendo. Gli scooter gratuiti compresi nel prezzo hanno reso il nostro soggiorno a Giulin ancora più piacevole e comodo. Il gestore della struttura è un signore estremamente accogliente e disponibile, il migliore host della nostra esperienza in Cina. Consigliato assolutamente se dovessimo tornare sceglieremmo di nuovo di soggiornare in questa splendida struttura. Servizio lavanderia top e ristorante veramente molto buono! Speriamo di tornare presto!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Friendly serene stay with great mountain views
reviews.positives: Great views from most of our rooms (a villa and a separate room); very serene location; customer service is excellent; included breakfast is fresh and wonderful.
reviews.negatives: Bathrooms in the villa need some updating to improve privacy and water drainage (eg with proper doors), short curtains did not work for us.

reviews.title: Great stay even better host
reviews.text: Absolutely loved it
reviews.room_type: Fully View Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Great deal, wonderful staff
reviews.positives: Fantastic staff. They were extraordinarily kind and helpful. They gave us free rides, free laundry. Amazing value! Decent place in a cute neighborhood. Nice to walk around, easy to walk to the cave.
reviews.negatives: Rooms are very worn. But it is a low price. The photos online are misleading.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: 老闆人很好知道頭兩天不能時間食早餐特意特早打包方便外帶路上食，還有煮的米粉比外頭的還好吃
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: A little boutique hotel if you want to stay away from the city!
reviews.positives:
The hotel offered picked up from the train station and it was a great help! Take the offer if you stay more than two nights since the train station could be a mess. 
I was sick arriving at the hotel, the hotel owner Xiao Ming was very kind and attentive to offer me drink and Chinese herbal medication.
reviews.negatives:
The breakfast could be better with more choices.
The location was remote in a village and you might feel lack of things to do.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 帥氣、熱情的老板，用心經營，房間整潔乾淨舒服，住2晚就可以安排從高鐵站接送到酒店，非常方便！司機的態度很好
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Perfectly nice place to spend a couple nights in Guilin
reviews.positives: Charming and homey little place with a friendly and helpful on-site manager. The Chinese noodle breakfast was very good. The outdoor clawfoot bathtub was cool.
reviews.negatives: The outside bathtub was quite dirty at check-in, washed myself to use.  The view from the bed was not what I expected from the pictures (no direct view).

reviews.title: 5星推薦！！
reviews.text: 剛來第一天老闆會給水果和又可以提早入住和延遲退房 老闆人很好而且回覆迅速 居住環境好 有山景 附近又有餐廳 又有免費早餐 老闆還會親自下廚 十分推薦來
reviews.room_type: Double Room with Massage - free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Fabulous stay for the money, staff nice, wifi worked great. Overall a great stay
reviews.positives: Loved the balcony and the beds were amazing! Also liked the staff. Very kind and friendly. Safe place to stay.
reviews.negatives: The air conditioning wasn’t very strong or wasn’t working properly. Hot in the room

reviews.title: 不讲信用的民宿
reviews.text: 我们到达后，前台服务人员要我们等五分钟，然后住店。在去房间的路上，他跟我们说我们被安排在了又大又新的房子。到达后，他就离开了。等我们抬头一看，才发现这是另外一家民宿。这家民宿接待人员跟我们说：我们订的民宿没有房间了，就把我们转到他这里了。这是公开的欺骗行为。
reviews.room_type: Fully View Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: 非常满意👍
reviews.text: 环境优美 很适合逃离城市的时候在这里放松 老板人很nice
reviews.room_type: Double Room with Courtyard View-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Unique service .
reviews.text: The guy in the reception is so helpful. He literally helped me with everything I needed without any hesitation. The breakfast is very good and has options, the location is very beautiful and the option to take a motorbike all the time free of charge makes a difference!
reviews.room_type: Fully View Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: The owner was very friendly and accommodated all our requirements.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Best stay
reviews.text: One of the best stay I have ever had so far. The setting was tranquil, and the view was breathtaking. It is nearby a few tourist attractions and only a 10-minute drive from the city center. The owner was hospitable and his service was exceptional, making the resort stand out. When we returned back to the resort, he always greeted us with drinks and chatted with us. Thank you, Secret Courtyard Resort for making my stay a memorable one.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Twin Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: best!!
reviews.text: I loved!!
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: The host was very gentil and welcoming! The room is big, confortable beds, good shower, good balcony... And the location is also great! In a vila with restaurants around.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Double Room-free pick up available from train station for minimun 2 nights stay

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great service and very good location!

reviews.title: Wonderful place away from the hustle of the city
reviews.positives: The villa is located in a secluded area, far from the hustle of the city, but still easy to reach by Didi or scooter, which are offered to guest to be used for free during the stay. Xiaming, the owner of the place, is a very nice person, very helpful and kind. He carried both our really heavy bags up the stairs  to our room on the 2nd floor. He gave us complimentary bottles of water, mandarines and napkins everytime we left the villa for a tour and when we did the checkout. The breakfast was also nice, being able to choose between Asia and European version. The room was nice and cosy. Though there is no central heating in the room, the air conditioning and the electric heated top mattress were more than enough.
reviews.negatives: N/A

reviews.title: This is my second time and if I come back to Guilin I’ll come back again to the same place.
reviews.positives: The room was well prepared before our arrival. It was cold and the room and prepared to keep us warm even before our arrival. Beds had heating pads and their room for families with kids was amazing. Enough toys and things to keep a 4 year old busy throughout. Comfortable bunk bed with double bed on the lower deck and single on the upper deck. On the whole nothing to complain.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: the location of thr hotel is in a quiet village, perfect if you want to enjoy nature and a peaceful time in Guilin. The rooms are great, the staff helped us with absolutely everything, breakfast was tasty and you can even use their motorbikes for free... we came back again and will do it next year!

reviews.title: We had a wonderful stay at this villa in Guilin. The surroundings are peaceful and quiet, which made it the perfect plac
reviews.positives: The location is slightly away from the main city, which we actually appreciated, as it gave us more tranquility while still being accessible by car or taxi. It’s also convenient to reach several tourist attractions in the area. Overall, this was a great stay and we would happily come back!

reviews.title: Great view and value
reviews.positives:
Great host. Apartment was big and very very clean. Good breakfast as well.
Excursions from the hotel were on the pricey side, but found them totally worth it.
Host very helpful and friendly, free laundry, restaurants around.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Ver nice and helpful staff.
reviews.positives: The hotel is in a very charming villa. The room was very clean and comfortable. We booked a room which had a couples massage included, which was very nice. Mr. Xiaoming was extremely helpful with everything we needed. It was my wife's birthday so he also helped me prepare something special for her.
reviews.negatives: The hotel is not very close to the city center and the tourists attractions. But there was the possibility to get electric bikes from the hotel for free which was very nice and helpful. Besides, Mr. Xiaoming also helps plan and book the visit to any tourist attraction.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The staff are so friendly and let you feel home ,welcome you with water, juice and watermelon even in the middle of the night.also the guide is so nice and offer very good insights and unforgettable moments ,i highly recommend this hotel ,also u get free scooter ,free laundry

reviews.title: I highly recommend this place, especially for families!
reviews.positives: Convenient location, big villa, kind staff, such a great place to stay for family!

reviews.title: highly recommended especially of short on time as the location is within walking and biking distance
reviews.positives: excellent location and view was wonderful, especially from terrace bath . staff were above and beyond expectations

reviews.title: A warm, welcoming, and unforgettable stay with the best host we've ever had — truly felt like home.
reviews.positives: The host was incredibly friendly, professional, and generous. He offered free watermelon every evening, provided complimentary e-bikes, free laundry service, and a delicious free breakfast. He also responded quickly to my visa document requests over email. Overall, the best and most thoughtful host I’ve ever stayed with!
reviews.negatives: Honestly, there was nothing I didn’t like. Everything was well taken care of, and the host went above and beyond. It felt like staying with a friend rather than just booking a place.

reviews.title: Must come back
reviews.positives: Beautiful area, and far from city center. Comfortable clean rooms with amenities and nice view. Breakfast was so good and freshly prepared. They provide electric bike and bicycles for guests to use, free of charge. Incredibly attentive and cooperative host, thank you Mr. Xiao. He gifted us watermelon and cookies before taking off to our next stop.

reviews.title: We love the location, staff and would recommend this place.
reviews.positives: Service was amazing. From picking us up at the train station to arranging our tours, service was flawless. We had 8 people in our group, aged from 16 to 52. Everyone loved the use of the scooters, the location, and the kids especially enjoyed the plum juice. Just wished we had a couple more days there. Will definitely stay here again if we take another trip to Guilin.
reviews.negatives: When we went, it was especially hot. The air conditioning could have been a bit colder. But once it got later into the evening, it was cool.

reviews.title: A fun experience in an unusual property :))
reviews.positives: The neighborhood is very cute and the offer of a free electric bike to travel around was very cool indeed.
reviews.negatives: Not sure that it felt like a problem but a slight lack of general tidiness in the property ... Actually all part of a laid-back style

reviews.title: Charming Inn in a quiet neighborhood
reviews.positives: This was a charming family run (I think?) in on a quiet little island off the main road in Northern Guilin. Everything was clean and comfortable and the owners made a great breakfast for everyone - choice of “Western” or “Chinese”. They also offered services like free use of motor scooters (super fun!) and free laundry.  You had the sense you were in a quiet little neighborhood with kids playing games outside and little restaurants a short walk away. All delightful.
reviews.negatives: Not that I “didn’t like” or expected, but the rooms themselves aren’t luxury or brand new, but are certainly very clean, have everything you need and have lovely touches like a Chinese tea service ready for you in a window seat.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything is great! The place is very well managed. I and my two college student childen loved our two-day stay. The interior design and the surrounding areas are beautiful. The host is very friendly, thoughtful and knowledgeable. He gave us many travel tips. We loved riding the scooters in the neighborhood. sincerely recommend it.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Staff was extremely attentive. The place was clean and charming with nice views to nearby mountains. 
We were able to use electric scooters from hotel. The village had several restaurants, a couple street food vendors and a couple small shops. Nearby hiking trail over the mountain was also a nice one.
reviews.negatives: Small mosquitos caused a bit itching to one of our group apparently due allergy. There were mosquito repellant available though, if we had just remembered to use it.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Amazing location, staff were so kind and welcoming. So helpful with advice, always ready with tea/coffee and orange juice whenever we appeared. 

Let us check in early no problems. The room is comfortable, really nice view of the surrounding karsts. 

The village the hotel is set in is really scenic and quaint. And easy to travel to Guilin from. 

Could bro recommend this wonderful hotel more.
reviews.negatives: Everything was perfect.

reviews.title: Lovely stay
reviews.positives: Quiet location set on a small island. Lovely staff who are eager to help. They had many tours available for us to choose from. Laid back atmosphere, very relaxing. The breakfast is top notch.

reviews.title: Would highly recommend for all travelers!
reviews.positives: Staying at this hotel was an incredible experience. We stayed for 4 nights and would highly recommend it for all travelers, whether Chinese nationals or foreigners. The host was super welcoming and helpful, giving us advice and answering any questions we had. He was also easily accessible. The rooms themselves were also clean and it was easy to feel right at home. Overall highly recommend for all travelers!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Xiao Ming made the experience an excellent one. He looked after us very well. We couldn't decide whether we should do the 4 hour Li River cruise but he suggested a different tour between Guilin and Yangshuo. We visited an ancient town, went on a bamboo boat up the river and stopped for  lunch. The breakfast was a choice between Guilin rice noodles and toast. The villa was great and the electric ma Jong table and added bonus. It was cold  because we came in Dec but each room had a heat pump so we were cosy
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Amazing vacation assisted by great host.
reviews.positives: Amazing stay, the host is extremely nice and helped throughout the way setting up arrival. Also helped with the itinerary and tour guide for an amazing trip.
reviews.negatives: Toilets could have stronger flushing but no issues overall.

reviews.title: Enjoyed my stay and impressed by the hospitality
reviews.positives: The breakfast is OK. The location is in a cute resort village if the serene and quietness is what you like. There is a 3 miles beautiful board walk behind the resort property where you can walk, jog, or bike. The famous LuDi cave is  only 15 mins walk away via the board walk.

reviews.title: Nice place to stay.
reviews.positives: Breakfast was prepared fresh and tasted good. Personal service was excellent. The whole staff was friendly. The room was nice and clean. The location is a short walk from Reed Flute Cave which is worth the visit.

reviews.title: We really enjoyed our stay at Secret Courtyard Hotel. The view was amazing and the housekeeper was so nice and courteous
reviews.positives:
- the room had a beautiful view and was very thoughtful decorated 
- the housekeeper was very friendly and prepared everything for us
- you can get everything you need there, from laundry to massage to getting a trip organized for you.

reviews.title: Wonderful place to spend a couple of nights
reviews.positives: Really nice and helpful staff! The old grandma took good care of us, providing tea and washing our clothes and even gave is a nice handcrafted departure gift. The location is central for the major attractions like Yangshuo in the South and the Longji rice terraces in the north

reviews.title: A peaceful adventure
reviews.positives: The location is perfect. The owner and staff are super helpful and welcoming. The day trips were incredible.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: This little village inn gets top marks for all the thoughtful little things that its owners have considered to make their guests’ stay as comfortable as possible. I got use of their electric scooter to hit the sights, the room was super clean with everything you need, breakfast was delicious and we even got a goodie bag to take with us on our journey, filled with fruits and little bits of snacks. I would never have expected it from a setup like this, and at this price point. Well done!
reviews.negatives: The outside could do with a bit of upkeeping.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Convenient location , very cozy

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: This is definitely the place you would like to stay if you woukd like to relax. There is a cycling and joghing track within walking distance from the hotel. The owner is very welcoming, helpful and go extra miles to make our visit enjoyable. I'm really happy with my stay and would like to go back again.
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: If you’re looking for a hotel with local charm, this is it
reviews.positives: It was not the standard five star hotel that I would normally stay at, but the place has a lot of unique charm And the guy who runs it is five star. He took care of all of our needs and helped us out as we scrambled for the train station. Not super fancy, but I would stay there again. If you’re looking for a more localized, charming feel, I would give it a try

reviews.title: Remarkable place
reviews.positives:
Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel in Guilin, China, is a hidden gem that offers guests a unique and memorable experience. Nestled along the Peach Flower River, this hotel is praised for its serene ambiance and beautiful local architectural elements.

The strong points of this hotel are cleanliness, service, and value, making it one of the top choices in Guilin 

The owner helpfulness’ in arranging customized travel routes and sightseeing plans was just perfect. Besides, the kindness of our guide and driver, Qin was also remarkable, adding a personal touch to the guests' experiences  and ensuring our comfort and convenience during our stay.

With its excellent location, the Secret Courtyard Resort Hotel serves as a peaceful retreat while still providing easy access to Guilin's famous attractions, such as the Reed Flute Cave and the Li River. 

Whether it's the thoughtful amenities, the attentive service, or the charming setting, this hotel is a wonderful choice for anyone looking to explore the natural beauty and culture of Guilin.
reviews.negatives: Nothing to comment

reviews.title: Gorgeous Guilin
reviews.positives: I like the Panda 🐼 stuff toys on the bed, little touch that made it feels like home. Room is well ventilated with Chinese style tea tatami setting. Xiaomin is a good host, helpful. Qin our guide, native who speaks English made the trip not so lost in translation for my hubby who doesn't speak Chinese. The local rice noodles served at breakfast was 😋 we had it everyday.
reviews.negatives: Bathroom wasn't properly clean, some hair from previous guest that had been collected but left in the corner of the tile 😕

reviews.title: Best homestay in Guilin
reviews.positives: Amazing homestay in a beautiful and quiet village 10 minutes away from Guilin. Room was nicely decorated with little cute details and the bed was super comfy. The landlord went above and beyond to make our stay perfect helping us with everything we needed. Must try the rice noodles for breakfast, delicious! Will definitely come back
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Excellent hospitality, great location, cozy rooms
reviews.positives: Everyone is incredibly warm, welcoming, and friendly. The staff went above and beyond to ensure our stay was comfortable. The rooms were clean and cozy and the breakfast was delicious. We loved our stay here and highly recommend it for anyone wishing to explore the beautiful city of Guilin!

reviews.title: Excellent hospitality and a cozy location
reviews.positives:
The location of this hotel is well situated on the outskirts of Guilin city. It has several attractions within a walkable distance, such as Reed Flute Cave, but it is also a drivable within an hour and a half  to major tourist sites like Longji rice terraces to the north and Yangshou county to the south. It is also within a cozy village, and we explored the local restaurants in the first day.

The friendly owner of the establishment went above and beyond in service, responded through text quickly to arrange private tours to the places we wanted to go. We were picked up from the train station when we arrived at Guilin and transported back at the end of the trip. Breakfast options range from homemade local guilin rice noodles with fruit to a more western style option if preferred. Bed was comfortable with working wifi and AC.

I was expecially impressed by the small things, how when we came back from a long day of touring the owner would always have fresh fruit waiting for us, how the towels and complimentary water would be refilled and waiting for us on our return, and how we were given a bag with snacks and other items for our trip home. 

If you are looking for a relaxed, local experience with good service that serves as a base to set off to see all Guilin has to offer, then I can't recommend this place enough.

reviews.title: Excellent stay at this boutique hotel and very kind staff.
reviews.positives: Host, breakfast, staff, clean , it was all great !!!
reviews.negatives: Everything was great

reviews.title: A relaxing and pleasant stay.
reviews.positives: The host was very friendly and care taking.   Love the location as it has a jogging track near by.  Breakfast was good.  The portion was good size.
reviews.negatives: The aircon in the room is a bit noisy when turn on.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: This place was great! Perfect for a trip to Guilin, out of the crowded spots so it’s super peaceful. The owner is really amazing and makes this spot perfect. We hope to be back.

reviews.title: A perfect boutuque hotel, not luxury but quite peaceful comfortable hotel
reviews.positives:
Friendly and very helpful of the owner, comfortable location with facilities of tandem bike, that made us travel around seeing a beautiful scenary.
The owner also help us arrange our tours plus help us bought the train tickets left Guilin.

reviews.title: Quiet stay in a peaceful and green environment. The host went out of his way to help each guest, which will make up for
reviews.positives: Location, service, breakfast.
reviews.negatives: Room cleaning could’ve been better.

reviews.title: We had a great time at this hotel! It was a quiet place where we could recharge from the day’s adventures, and the owner
reviews.positives: The property is well taken care of and a tasteful blend of rustic decor and modern amenities. It is also tucked away on a quiet side of the city. The owner is eager to help plan itineraries for Guilin’s many attractions, and the hotel’s Guilin Rice Noodles easily competes with the best in the city.
reviews.negatives: The property is a little hard to get to via public transportation, but taxis are cheap and plentiful.

reviews.title: Within walking distance to Reed Flute Cave
reviews.positives: I stayed three nights at the hotel. It's locally owned and situated inside a modern village. The owner was friendly and helpful. He provided information about Guilin and helped my father and me booked a tour to Longji rice terraces. The hotel is approximately 30 minutes walk to Reed Flute Cave. The cave opens 8 AM. My father and I went to the cave the day we checked out. I highly recommend going in the morning because there's no crowd.
reviews.negatives: The shower was a bit dark and would be nice to have a light installed.
